title: lonicera × americana var. rubella
intro: Lonicera × americana var. rubella, also known as American Beauty honeysuckle or Coral honeysuckle, is a deciduous, evergreen climber native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing stress, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Lonicera × americana var. rubella are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
